Jacques Kallis Says SA20 Has Transformed South African Cricket Like IPL Did For India

Dec 3, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

SA20 Driving Change in South African Cricket: Kallis Weighs In

The SA20 league has emerged as a transformative force in South African cricket. According to Proteas legend Jacques Kallis, its impact is beginning to mirror what the Indian Premier League (IPL) did for India in its early years.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Jacques Kallis Says SA20 Has Transformed South African Cricket Like IPL Did For India
